assertions: vlx_saved_words_v1 contains dissonance.
Saved source is word_page.
vlx_review_state_v1 contains dissonance.
Initial mastery is New.
Initial box is 0.
Page offers a review action.
cases.safety: No Webflow, payment, auth, or production data behavior.

setup: Clear localStorage learning keys or use a fresh slug.
assertions: Canonical slug dissonance is saved.
Saved source is alias_search on first save.
Review state is created with mastery New.
Unknown aliases do not expose fake save actions.
cases.safety: Alias search must not create invented word cards.

setup: Clear localStorage learning keys or use a fresh slug.
assertions: Saved source is extension.
Review state is created with box 0.
No extension token or private browsing data is stored.
Review is offered as the next action.
cases.safety: Extension source uses the same app-side contract as other saves.

setup: Seed at least one item with nextDueAt in the past.
assertions: A due item is selected from review state.
Submitting an answer appends vlx_review_events_v1.
Submitting an answer updates vlx_review_state_v1.
Wrong answers increase weakness and return sooner.
Correct answers obey VLX 5-box rules.
cases.safety: No fake due counts or mastery claims.

setup: Seed at least one item with mastery Weak or weakScore above 0.
assertions: A weak item is selected from real review state.
Answer event records questionType, result, responseMs, boxAfter, and weakScoreAfter.
State updates after correct or wrong answer.
Mastered is not assigned without delayed recall.
cases.safety: Weak review must not use random filler words.

setup: Seed multiple weak items or verify honest empty state.
assertions: Sprint uses real weak candidates.
Empty state appears when there are no weak words.
Each answer writes an event.
Completion does not fake mastery.
cases.safety: Weak sprint is a rescue path, not a decorative game mode.

assertions: Pack detail renders academic preview honestly.
Starting preview records preview start.
Preview review carries packId academic-vocabulary.
Completion records reviewed and correct counts from actual answers.
Placeholder paid packs do not claim unlock.

setup: Run with no NEXT_PUBLIC_LITE_PAYMENT_URL unless testing configured external beta links.
assertions: Lite CTA explains beta/payment status.
Without payment URL, click writes local upgrade interest only.
No checkout route is created.
No subscription state is claimed.
cases.safety: Lite CTA must not create real payment.

setup: Run with no NEXT_PUBLIC_PRO_PAYMENT_URL unless testing configured external beta links.
assertions: Pro CTA explains beta/payment status.
Without payment URL, click writes local upgrade interest only.
Configured external URL appends safe plan and source context.
No payment SDK is loaded.
cases.safety: Pro CTA must not create real payment.

assertions: No app checkout route completes payment.
No billing route mutates subscription state.
No API checkout handler exists without explicit payment scope.
No frontend payment secret is present.
cases.safety: Real payment remains out of scope for paid beta hardening.
